Interface AdoptionApplicationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AdoptionApplicationServiceImpl
public interface AdoptionApplicationService
Application service for the adoption request lifecycle. Orchestrates validation, state transitions, notifications, and audit logging for each step of the adoption workflow (submit, approve, reject, cancel).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    approveRequest(String requestId)
    Approves a pending adoption request, marking the animal as adopted and notifying the adopter.
    void
    cancelRequest(String requestId)
    Cancels a pending adoption request before it has been reviewed.
    List<AdoptionRequest>
    listAllRequests()
    Returns every adoption request currently in the system.
    void
    rejectRequest(String requestId)
    Rejects a pending adoption request, leaving the animal available for other requests.
    AdoptionRequest
    submitRequest(String adopterId, String animalId)
    Submits a new adoption request on behalf of the given adopter for the given animal.

  • Method Details

    • submitRequest

      AdoptionRequest submitRequest(String adopterId, String animalId)
      Submits a new adoption request on behalf of the given adopter for the given animal. Throws an exception if the adopter or animal is not found, or if the animal is not available.
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter submitting the request; must not be null or blank
      animalId - the ID of the animal being requested; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      the newly created AdoptionRequest

    • approveRequest

      void approveRequest(String requestId)
      Approves a pending adoption request, marking the animal as adopted and notifying the adopter. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to approve; must not be null or blank

    • rejectRequest

      void rejectRequest(String requestId)
      Rejects a pending adoption request, leaving the animal available for other requests. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to reject; must not be null or blank

    • cancelRequest

      void cancelRequest(String requestId)
      Cancels a pending adoption request before it has been reviewed. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the adoption request to cancel; must not be null or blank

    • listAllRequests

      List<AdoptionRequest> listAllRequests()
      Returns every adoption request currently in the system. Returns an empty list if no adoption requests have been submitted. Used by the shelter print command to render a system-wide snapshot.
      Returns:
      a list of all adoption requests
